faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Hamilton Heights home?
faqs.answer: Signs of clothes moth infestation include small holes in wool clothing or upholstery, silky webbing in closet corners, small beige larvae on fabrics, and adult moths flying near wardrobes. You may also notice damaged rugs, blankets, or other natural fiber items. Our Hamilton Heights technicians provide thorough inspections to confirm moth activity and identify the species.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in Hamilton Heights?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Hamilton Heights typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the infestation severity, number of rooms affected, and treatment method required. Minor infestations in a single closet may cost $550-$1,200, while whole-home treatments for severe infestations can reach $3,000-$5,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.
